pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the furniture and interior design studio, highlighting key categories, services, tools, and featured content. Acts as the main hub into shopping categories, design services, style quiz, and inspiration content.
primary_functions: Provide quick navigation to main shopping categories such as Living Room, Dining Room, and Home Office
Highlight key services like Design Services, Design Packages, and Custom Furniture with clear calls to action
Promote the Style Quiz and link directly to the quiz start page
Provide access to Journal/Blog, Account & Favorites, and Cart via header
Show featured products or collections as shortcuts into filtered product listings

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a main category tile such as "Living Room", "Dining Room", or "Home Office"
Click on a featured subcategory card such as "Sofas & Sectionals" or "Desks"
Click on a "Design Services" call-to-action card
Click on a "Design Packages" call-to-action card
Click on a "Custom Furniture" hero or promo section
Click on a featured Journal/Blog article group or "View All Articles" link
Click on the "Style Quiz" promo banner or button
Click on the "Sign Up" or "Account" link in header
Click on the cart icon in the header

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via "Home" link
Default landing page at site root URL

pages.name: Product Listing & Category
pages.description: Category and subcategory product listing page used for browsing, filtering, and sorting furniture and decor across Living Room, Dining Room, Home Office, Decor, and related areas.
primary_functions: Display a grid of products for a given category or subcategory (e.g., Living Room, Home Office, Dining Tables, Decor)
Allow users to filter products by attributes such as subcategory, seating_capacity, style, color/fabric, material, table_type/features, price range, customer_rating, and free_shipping
Provide category-specific filters like 3-seater, Scandinavian, light gray, extendable, solid wood, 6+ seats
Allow users to sort results (e.g., Price: Low to High, Customer Rating: High to Low)
Provide subcategory navigation within a category (e.g., Sofas & Sectionals, Desks, Office Chairs, Desk Lamps, Decor, Cushions, Rugs)
Offer breadcrumbs to move between category levels (e.g., Home > Home Office > Desks)
Link each product card to its Product Detail page

incoming_params.description: Top-level category key (e.g., "living_room", "dining_room", "home_office", "decor") determining which category's products to show.
Subcategory key (e.g., "sofas_sectionals", "desks", "office_chairs", "desk_lamps", "dining_tables", "decor", "cushions", "rugs") for narrowing the listing.
Style filter key (e.g., "modern", "scandinavian", "bohemian") used for style-based browsing such as "Shop This Style".
Identifier for the style quiz result, passed mainly for tracking or personalization when arriving from a quiz result.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card image or title in the product grid.
Click on a subcategory link within the category navigation (e.g., "Sofas & Sectionals", "Desks").
Click on the cart icon in the header while browsing products.
Click on breadcrumb link "Home".

access_methods.description: Access via header links such as "Living Room", "Dining Room", and "Home Office" which set the categoryId parameter.
Accessed via URLs like products.html?categoryId=living_room&subcategoryId=sofas_sectionals.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single product with full specifications, images, and purchasing controls for sofas, tables, desks, decor, and other pieces.
primary_functions: Show detailed product information including images, description, dimensions, materials, style, seating capacity, and features such as extendable length
Display price, any applicable shipping information (including indicators for free shipping), and customer rating
Allow users to select quantity and add the product to the cart
Show detailed specifications section including extended length for dining tables to support comparison
Provide related or recommended products as optional browsing paths

incoming_params.description: Product ID specifying which product details to display; typically comes from clicking a product card in listings or featured modules.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "View Cart" or the cart icon after adding an item to the cart.
Click on breadcrumb link back to the category or subcategory listing.

access_methods.description: Accessed via URLs like product.html?id=PRODUCT_ID when a product is selected from a listing or featured section.

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page displaying selected products, quantities, and totals. Supports budget checks and editing of line items.
primary_functions: List all items added to the cart with name, thumbnail, price, quantity, and subtotal
Show the combined cart total to support budget-based decisions (e.g., staying under $800 for a home office setup)
Allow users to change quantities or remove items using a Remove/trash control
Indicate any shipping costs or free shipping status at cart level
Provide navigation to continue shopping or proceed to checkout (even if checkout is out of scope)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product name or thumbnail within the cart to view its details.
Click on a "Continue Shopping" button or link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the cart icon or a "Cart" label in the global header.
Accessible via the "Cart" link in the site footer.

pages.name: Design Services Overview
pages.description: Overview of available design services such as Living Room Makeover, with entry points to booking, descriptions of what to expect, and highlights of service types.
primary_functions: List available design services (e.g., Living Room Makeover, Home Office Planning) with short descriptions and images
Provide a clear 'Book a Consultation' button for each service that leads to the Service Booking page with the service preselected
Explain how design consultations work (e.g., video call, in-home, in-studio) at a high level
Offer links back to Home and to Design Packages for users seeking more structured offerings

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Book a Consultation" for a specific service (e.g., "Living Room Makeover").
Click on a link or promo suggesting structured design packages.
Click on a breadcrumb or logo to return to the Home page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Design Services" link in the main header navigation.
Accessible via the "Design Services" link in the footer navigation.

pages.name: Service Booking
pages.description: Interactive booking page for scheduling design consultations for specific services. Handles appointment type selection, date/time picking, and capture of contact details.
primary_functions: Allow users to select or confirm the service type (e.g., Living Room Makeover) via a dropdown
Provide appointment type options such as Video Call, In-Home, or In-Studio and allow selection
Include a date picker that supports navigating to future weeks and selecting specific days (e.g., next Tuesday)
Display available time slots for the chosen date and allow a time slot selection (e.g., 3:00 PM)
Collect contact details including name, email, phone number, and notes/project details
Submit the booking request and show a confirmation message or reference on the same page

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the design service being booked (e.g., the "Living Room Makeover" service). Preselects the service in the booking form.
Optional appointment type key (e.g., "video_call") to preselect the consultation mode if provided.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a "Back to Services" or breadcrumb link after reviewing or submitting a booking.

access_methods.description: Accessed via links such as booking.html?serviceId=SERVICE_ID when users click "Book a Consultation".
May also be accessed from promotional campaigns linking directly to a specific service booking URL.

pages.name: Design Packages Overview
pages.description: Overview of predefined design packages for different rooms, including Bedroom Makeover and other room packages, with quick comparison and navigation to detailed configuration.
primary_functions: Show a list of available design packages categorized by room type (e.g., Bedroom Makeover, Living Room Package)
Provide summary information for each package such as what is included, target room size ranges, and approximate pricing tiers
Offer a 'View Details' or 'Choose Package' button for each package linking to the Package Detail & Quote Request page
Help users compare package types at a high level before viewing detailed configuration options

incoming_params.description: Optional room type filter (e.g., "bedroom", "living_room") to highlight relevant packages on load.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "View Details" or "Choose Package" for a given package, such as "Bedroom Makeover".
Click on a breadcrumb link back to Home.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Design Packages" item in the main header navigation.
Accessible via the "Design Packages" link in the footer.

pages.name: Package Detail & Quote Request
pages.description: Configuration and quote request page for a specific design package such as a Bedroom Makeover, allowing room-size, color palette, and tier selection before sending a quote request.
primary_functions: Display full details of the selected design package, including what is included and example outcomes

Allow users to configure the package with controls such as room size selection (e.g., 1015 m�b2 covering 1215 m�b2 rooms), color palette (e.g., Neutral/Calm Neutrals), and package tier (e.g., Basic, Standard, Premium)
Update indicative pricing or scope information based on configuration (if applicable)
Provide a 'Request a Quote' button that reveals or scrolls to a quote request form
Collect user information including name, email, project details/message, and preferred contact method (e.g., Email)
Submit the quote request and show a confirmation message on the page

incoming_params.description: ID of the selected design package (e.g., the Bedroom Makeover package) whose details and configuration options should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a breadcrumb or "Back to Packages" link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via URLs like package_detail.html?packageId=PACKAGE_ID when a package is selected from the overview.

pages.name: Journal / Blog Listing
pages.description: Journal or blog index with search and filtering for design articles about small apartments, living rooms, and other topics, supporting discovery of inspiration content.
primary_functions: Display a list or grid of articles with titles, excerpts, topics/tags, and thumbnails
Provide a search field to search articles by keyword (e.g., 'small apartment living room')
Offer filters by topic or tag (e.g., 'Small Spaces', 'Living Room') to refine results
Allow users to click an article to view full details on the Article Detail page
Surface featured or trending content to aid discovery of popular design ideas

incoming_params.description: Search term entered by the user to find relevant articles (e.g., "small apartment living room").
Optional tag filter, such as "Small Spaces" or "Living Room", applied from tag chips or featured topic links.
Optional topic/category filter representing broader groupings of content.
Pagination control for navigating through multiple pages of article results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article card title or image in the listing.
Submit the search form in the blog header or search bar.
Click on a tag or topic filter chip like "Small Spaces".

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Journal" link in the main navigation.
Accessible via the "Journal" link in the footer.

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for a single journal or blog article with save-to-favorites capability and navigation to related content.
primary_functions: Display the complete article content including text, images, and any embedded media
Show article metadata such as title, author, date, and related tags/topics
Provide a 'Save', heart icon, or 'Add to Favorites' control to save the article to the user's favorites list in the Account page
Offer navigation to related or recommended articles for further reading
Enable easy navigation back to the Journal listing or search results

incoming_params.description: ID of the article to display, selected from a list, favorites, or homepage feature.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a "Back to Journal" link or breadcrumb.
Click on a "View My Favorites" link after saving an article.
Click on a related article card in the sidebar or footer of the article.

access_methods.description: Accessed via URLs like article.html?id=ARTICLE_ID from Journal listings, favorites, or homepage features.

pages.name: Style Quiz
pages.description: Interactive quiz to determine the user's preferred interior design style and guide them into style-matched shopping.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose of the quiz and how it works on an introduction section
Provide a 'Start Quiz' button to begin the questionnaire
Present a sequence of style-related questions with multiple-choice answers (e.g., preferred rooms, colors, materials)
Allow users to move through the quiz questions and record their selections
On completion, allow users to submit answers via a 'See My Style' button that leads to the Style Results page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the "See My Style" button after answering the quiz questions.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the "Style Quiz" link in the main header navigation.
Accessible from the "Style Quiz" link in the footer.
Accessible via promo banners or buttons on the Home page.

pages.name: Style Results
pages.description: Results page for the style quiz showing the recommended style, supporting imagery, and a pathway to shop products matching that style.
primary_functions: Display the recommended style name (e.g., Modern, Scandinavian, Bohemian) and a brief description
Show sample images or moodboards that represent the recommended style
Provide a prominent 'Shop This Style' link or button that leads to a style-filtered Product Listing (e.g., products.html?styleId=scandinavian&categoryId=decor)
Highlight key product categories matching the style, such as decor, sofas, or lighting
Allow users to retake the quiz or share their result if desired

incoming_params.description: Recommended style key (e.g., "modern", "scandinavian") used to label the result and to build "Shop This Style" links.
Identifier of the style quiz result, which can be used for personalization or tracking.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the main "Shop This Style" button to browse decor items that match the recommended style.
Click on a style-highlighted category card such as "Sofas & Seating" for the recommended style.
Click on a "Retake Quiz" link or button.

access_methods.description: Accessed primarily after quiz completion via URLs like style_results.html?styleKey=scandinavian&styleQuizResultId=RESULT_ID.

pages.name: Custom Furniture Overview
pages.description: Landing page for custom furniture services including access to the shelving planner, with explanation of process, benefits, and example projects.
primary_functions: Explain the custom furniture offering, including types of custom pieces available (e.g., shelving, media units, storage)
Highlight benefits of custom furniture and show example projects or images
Provide a clear 'Design Your Shelving' or 'Shelving Planner' button linking to the Shelving Planner page
Offer links to related services such as Design Services or relevant Journal articles for inspiration

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the primary "Design Your Shelving" or "Open Shelving Planner" button.
Click on a related link to book a consultation for custom pieces.
Click on inspiration links pointing to Journal articles about custom storage or shelving.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Custom Furniture" link in the main header navigation.
Accessible via the "Custom Furniture" link in the footer.

pages.name: Shelving Planner
pages.description: Interactive tool for configuring a custom shelving unit including dimensions, materials, and modules, with live price updates and the ability to save designs.
primary_functions: Allow users to input wall width and height dimensions (e.g., 250 cm width, 220 cm height) and apply them to the design area
Provide material/finish selection options such as Walnut for the shelving
Enable users to add and remove modules (e.g., Add Shelf, Add Cabinet) and visually see them in the design layout
Dynamically calculate and display the total price of the configured shelving based on modules and options
Allow users to adjust the design (e.g., remove shelf modules) until the total price meets a budget constraint (e.g., $1200 or less)
Provide a 'Save Design' or 'Save to Wishlist' button to store the configuration
When saving, prompt for a design name (e.g., 'Walnut Wall Shelving 250cm') and confirm that it has been saved to the user's Account & Favorites

incoming_params.description: Indicates whether the planner should start a "new" design or open in "edit" mode for an existing saved configuration.
Optional ID of a saved shelving configuration selected from Account & Favorites to be edited in the planner.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a "View Saved Designs" link or after saving a configuration when choosing to manage it.
Click on a breadcrumb link back to the Custom Furniture overview.

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking the "Design Your Shelving" button on the Custom Furniture overview page.
Accessed via URLs like shelving_planner.html?mode=edit&configurationId=CONFIG_ID when editing an existing design from Account & Favorites.

pages.name: Account & Favorites
pages.description: Single-user profile and saved items area encompassing basic account details, favorites, and saved designs. Central place to manage name/email, view saved articles, and manage custom shelving configurations.
primary_functions: Allow the user to create or update a simple profile by entering first name, last name, email, and a password field (used for preferences, not multi-user authentication)
Act as the destination for the 'Sign Up' or 'Create Account' link in the header
Display a list of saved/favorited articles added from the Article Detail page
Show saved custom furniture designs from the Shelving Planner, including names such as 'Walnut Wall Shelving 250cm'
Optionally list any favorited products or wishlisted items if supported in the future
Provide controls to remove items from favorites or rename saved designs if desired

incoming_params.description: Optional indicator of which tab or section to focus (e.g., "profile", "favorites", "designs").

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved article card in the Favorites section.
Click on a saved shelving configuration's "Edit in Planner" action.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Sign Up" / "Account" link in the header.
Accessible via the "Account & Favorites" link in the footer.
Section targeting via URLs such as account.html?section=favorites from "View Favorites" links.

pages.name: About Studio
pages.description: Informational page about the furniture and interior design studio, covering story, philosophy, team, and contact details, with links to key services and content areas.
primary_functions: Present the studio's story, design philosophy, and key team members
Explain the overall service offering, including custom furniture and design consultations, at a high level
Provide basic contact information such as email, phone number, and studio location if applicable
Link to key functional areas like Design Services, Design Packages, Custom Furniture, and Journal for users who want to explore further

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a link within the service overview section to explore design consultations.
Click on a link within the services overview to explore predefined packages.
Click on a link from the custom furniture description to see more details and examples.
Click on a link to read more about the studio's work and philosophy in the Journal.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "About" link in the footer navigation.
May be linked directly from external marketing or social media to explain the studio.

header_links.description: Return to the homepage with featured categories and services
Browse living room furniture such as sofas and sectionals
Browse dining room furniture including dining tables
Browse home office furniture such as desks, chairs, and lighting
Explore custom furniture options and access the shelving planner
View and book interior design services including room makeovers
Explore predefined design packages such as bedroom makeovers
Read design articles, tips, and inspiration in the blog
Take the style quiz to discover and shop your decor style
Create or edit your profile and view saved favorites and designs

footer_links.description: Learn about the studio, philosophy, and contact details
Overview of design services and consultation booking
Browse structured design packages and request quotes
Information on custom furniture and link to the shelving planner
Browse all design articles and inspiration content
Start the style quiz to get a personalized style recommendation
Manage your profile and see your saved articles and designs
View items currently in your shopping cart and adjust selections
